title: Puerto Rico
subtitle: December 2022 island trip
summary: A late-2022 trip that feels like a marker between the Cornell chapter and what came next, with beaches, coastal stops, and a very different atmosphere from Ithaca.

blocks.text: The old tripline artwork turns this into a vivid node: Old San Juan, Punta Higuero Lighthouse, beaches, airport thresholds, and a compact trip at the end of 2022 that feels transitional in the larger story.

items: Playa Escondida and other coastal stops
